name: weixin
description: Weixin (微信) bridge for Codex — connect Weixin to Codex via official iLink Bot API

interface.shortDescription: Bridge Weixin messages to Codex via iLink Bot API
interface.longDescription: Connect Weixin to Codex via the official iLink Bot API. Receive Weixin messages as Codex turns and reply automatically. Supports text, images, files, and voice messages.
defaultPrompt: Help me respond to Weixin messages
